recommendations.title: Where Is The Friend's House?
recommendations.overview: An 8-year-old boy must return his friend's notebook he took by mistake, lest his friend be punished by expulsion from school.

recommendations.title: Certified Copy
recommendations.overview: In Tuscany to promote his latest book, a middle-aged English writer meets a French woman who leads him to the village of Lucignano.

recommendations.title: Life, and Nothing More…
recommendations.overview: After the earthquake of Guilan, a film director and his son travel to the devastated area to search for the actors from the movie the director made there a few years previously. In their search, they see how people who have lost everything in the ear

recommendations.title: Ten
recommendations.overview: A visual social examination in the form of ten conversations between a driving woman and her various pick-ups and hitchhikers.

recommendations.title: Close-Up
recommendations.overview: This fiction-documentary hybrid uses a sensational real-life event—the arrest of a young man on charges that he fraudulently impersonated the well-known filmmaker Mohsen Makhmalbaf—as the basis for a stunning, multilayered investigation into movies,

recommendations.title: Like Someone in Love
recommendations.overview: An old man and a young woman meet in Tokyo. She knows nothing about him, he thinks he knows her. He welcomes her into his home, she offers him her body. But the web that is woven between them in the space of twenty four hours bears no relation to the

recommendations.title: The Wind Will Carry Us
recommendations.overview: Irreverent city engineer Behzad comes to a rural Kurdish village in Iran to keep vigil for a dying relative. In the meanwhile the film follows his efforts to fit in with the local community and how he changes his own attitudes as a result.

recommendations.title: Taste of Cherry
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged Tehranian man, Mr. Badii is intent on killing himself and seeks someone to bury him after his demise. Driving around the city, the seemingly well-to-do Badii meets with numerous people, including a Muslim student, asking them to take on

recommendations.title: Down by Love
recommendations.overview: A man, a woman. A prison director, his inmate. An impossible love, a true story.

recommendations.title: A Simple Life
recommendations.overview: After suffering a stroke, an altruistic maid announces that she wants to quit her job and move into an old people's home.
